sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial appoints Liane Pelletier to board of directors
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial has appointed Liane J. Pelletier to its board of directors, effective Wednesday. Pelletier brings extensive experience in corporate strategy, technology, and governance from her previous roles at Alaska Communications Systems Group and Sprint Corporation, as well as current directorships at Expeditors International of Washington, Inc. and Frontdoor, Inc. The appointment comes as Ameriprise shows strong financial health, with management actively buying back shares and maintaining consistent dividend payments.

feed.title: Top Wealth Group (NASDAQ: TWG) closes $5.04M offer, potential $10.08M from warrants
feed.summary: Top Wealth Group Holding (NASDAQ: TWG) announced the closing of a best-efforts public offering of 720,000 units at $7.00 per unit, generating approximately $5.04 million in gross proceeds. Each unit includes one Class A ordinary share and two warrants, potentially raising an additional $10.08 million if all warrants are exercised for cash. The net proceeds are earmarked for general corporate and working capital purposes.

feed.title: BREAKING: Rezolute, Inc. Shares Down Over 85%; Securities Fraud Investigation by Block & Leviton Could Allow Investors to Recover Losses
feed.summary: Shares of Rezolute, Inc. (RZLT) dropped over 85% after its Phase 3 sunRIZE study failed to meet primary or key secondary endpoints. Block & Leviton is investigating potential securities law violations and encourages investors who lost money to contact them. The firm is considering filing a class action lawsuit to recover losses on behalf of investors.

feed.title: Industry Veteran Takes Helm as President of Norwegian Cruise Line
feed.summary: Marc Kazlauskas has been appointed as the new president of Norwegian Cruise Line, succeeding David Herrera. Kazlauskas, an industry veteran, joins the company as it prepares for fleet expansion with the Norwegian Luna and significant upgrades to its private island, Great Stirrup Cay. Parent company NCLH CEO Harry Sommer praised Kazlauskas' leadership and commercial expertise, anticipating continued success for the brand.

feed.title: Equinix targets 150MW campus in Lelystad, Netherlands
feed.summary: Equinix is reportedly planning a 150MW data center campus in Lelystad, Netherlands, with an investment of €1.5 billion ($1.7bn). The project will comprise three two-story buildings at the Flevokust Haven industrial estate, powered directly by the Maxima gas-fired power plant. Construction is expected to begin next year, with phased completion through 2028 or 2029.

feed.title: Charles River Extends Commitment to Advanced Therapy Developers with Second Incubator Program Cohort
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories announced the second cohort of its Cell & Gene Therapy Incubator Program (CIP), supporting early-stage biotechnology with scientific expertise and development capabilities. The program features four advanced therapy developers and two enabling technology developers, aiming to accelerate the creation of life-changing therapies. Participants receive mentorship, regulatory guidance, and access to Charles River’s global network to advance their programs from concept to cure.

feed.title: Wall Street Analysts Predict a 25.78% Upside in Omnicom (OMC): Here's What You Should Know
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts anticipate a significant upside for Omnicom (OMC), with a mean price target of $97.38 suggesting a 25.8% gain from its current $77.42. This optimism is supported by a strong agreement among analysts and a positive trend in earnings estimate revisions, leading to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) for the stock. However, the article cautions investors to treat price targets with skepticism, as business incentives can sometimes lead to inflated projections.

feed.title: McDonald’s pulls Grinchy AI-made Christmas ad after avalanche of complaints
feed.summary: McDonald's Netherlands has removed an AI-generated Christmas advertisement after receiving widespread criticism for its "Grinchy" and un-festive tone. The ad, which depicted holiday misfortunes and suggested seeking refuge at McDonald's, was viewed millions of times through reposts despite being pulled from official channels. While the ad was created using AI, a 10-person crew spent five weeks working on it, highlighting the effort involved in AI-assisted creative projects.

feed.title: Why the Marzetti Company’s master data project is paying off in the AI era
feed.summary: The Marzetti Company's proactive master data consolidation project, completed before the AI boom, has strategically positioned them ahead of competitors. CIO Liam Durbin highlights how clean, unified data is crucial for leveraging AI effectively, enabling initiatives like accounts payable automation. Durbin advises other companies to fully fund and staff master data projects, despite their perceived lack of glamor, to ensure robust data quality essential for AI and ERP success.

feed.title: Keysight (NYSE: KEYS) and KT SAT validate Ku-band GEO to LEO NTN handover for 3GPP Rel-19
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies and KT SAT successfully demonstrated an industry-first multi-orbit non-terrestrial network (NTN) handover between a commercial geostationary Earth orbit (GEO) satellite and an emulated low Earth orbit (LEO) link using Ku-band connectivity. This achievement validates a core 6G capability, ensuring session continuity and advancing the testing of newly standardized 3GPP Rel-19 Ku-band NTN spectrum. The collaboration enables operators to analyze NTN handover behavior and optimize mobility strategies in a lab setting, reducing the cost and risk associated with early deployments of these advanced communication systems.

feed.title: HII (NYSE: HII) advances ROMULUS USV prototype to 30%, targets 2026 sea trials
feed.summary: HII announced its ROMULUS unmanned surface vessel (USV) prototype has reached 30% completion and is on schedule for sea trials in Q4 2026. This modular, AI-enabled USV family, built around HII’s Odyssey Autonomous Control System, is designed for high-endurance, sustained open-ocean autonomy for naval missions. The prototype integrates third-party autonomy and sustainment tech from partners like Shield AI, Applied Intuition, and C3 AI.

feed.title: Home Depot builds bridge to influencers with creator portal
feed.summary: Home Depot has launched a new Creator Portal to connect with influencers and content creators in the home improvement space, following a trend seen with competitors like Lowe's. The platform aims to inspire content development, offer campaign and affiliate marketing opportunities, and has already enrolled thousands of creators. To promote the portal, Home Depot is leveraging a "Starting Lineup" of creators, including athletes and home-improvement experts, tied to the upcoming 2026 World Cup.

feed.title: BP, Chevron Top US Gulf Lease Sale
feed.summary: BP PLC and Chevron Corp led the first oil and gas lease auction under the Trump administration's "One Big Beautiful Act," securing 51 and 24 blocks respectively in the Gulf of America. This "Lease Sale Big Beautiful Gulf 1", the first of at least 30 required sales, saw 30 companies participate, submitting 219 bids totaling $371.88 million. The strong bidding reflects sustained industry confidence and a renewed offshore energy strategy aimed at strengthening national security and economic opportunity.

feed.title: Williams Cos SVP Wilson sells $123,800 in stock
feed.summary: Terrance Lane Wilson, SVP & General Counsel at Williams Companies, Inc. (NYSE:WMB), sold 2,000 shares of the company’s common stock for $123,800. This transaction occurred on December 9, 2025, and leaves Wilson with a direct ownership of 297,545 shares and an indirect ownership of 3,100 shares. The company has a market capitalization of $74.04 billion and a 3.31% dividend yield, with current analyst price targets ranging from $53 to $83.

feed.title: Newmont Goldcorp stock hits all-time high at 98.75 USD
feed.summary: Newmont Goldcorp's stock reached an all-time high of $98.75, showing a 136.43% year-over-year change and strong investor confidence amid favorable gold market conditions. The company exhibits exceptional financial strength with a Piotroski Score of 9 and an undervalued P/E ratio of 15.2, according to InvestingPro. Despite a recent analyst downgrade due to valuation concerns, Newmont reported strong Q3 2025 earnings and advanced its Ahafo North project.

feed.title: Is Leadership Turnover, Ajax Risk And Steady Dividend Altering The Investment Case For General Dynamics (GD)?
feed.summary: General Dynamics recently promoted a new president, announced a controller transition, and declared a $1.50 quarterly dividend, while also facing potential cancellation of the U.K.’s £6.30 billion Ajax armored vehicle program due to safety concerns. These changes, combined with ongoing dividend payments and program-specific risks, highlight how the company balances governance stability with exposure to significant defense revenues. The article explores how the Ajax program uncertainty and leadership changes could influence General Dynamics' investment outlook.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) Declares $0.52 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.52 per share, payable on February 13th, with an ex-dividend date of January 21st. The company has increased its dividend for 63 consecutive years, boasts a payout ratio of approximately 53%, and analysts project its earnings will sufficiently cover future dividends. Shares traded up 0.8% to $78.39 after the company reported better-than-expected earnings of $0.91 EPS last quarter.

feed.title: Mars-Kellanova transaction finalized
feed.summary: Mars, Inc. has completed its acquisition of Kellanova for approximately $35.9 billion, bringing together Mars Snacking brands like Snickers and M&M’s with Kellanova brands such as Pringles and Cheez-It. This transaction follows regulatory approvals and is expected to create a combined snack business generating about $36 billion in annual revenues. Kellanova, formed in October 2023 from a split of Kellogg Co., will no longer trade on the New York Stock Exchange.

feed.title: Disney Hits Google With AI Copyright Infringement Cease-and-Desist Letter
feed.summary: Disney has issued a cease-and-desist letter to Google, accusing the tech giant of massive copyright infringement by using Disney's copyrighted works to train its AI models. Disney claims Google's AI services like Veo, Imagen, and Nano Banana, embedded in products such as Google Workspace and YouTube, are generating pristine images of Disney characters in response to user prompts. This action comes shortly after Disney announced a partnership with OpenAI and invested in the Google rival, highlighting a growing legal battle over AI and intellectual property.

feed.title: Altria CEO Billy Gifford to retire in 2026
feed.summary: Altria Group announced that CEO Billy Gifford will retire on May 14, 2026, and will be succeeded by current executive vice president and CFO Sal Mancuso. Heather Newman will take over as CFO. Gifford will serve as a consultant through the end of 2026 for a smooth transition.

feed.title: GE HealthCare warns on certain Carestation anesthesia systems
feed.summary: GE HealthCare has issued a warning regarding its Carestation 600 and 700 series anesthesia systems due to a potential for unexpected shutdown if AC mains power is lost. This can lead to a temporary disruption of ventilation and anesthetic delivery. The company advises users to ensure a secure power connection and to use alternative ventilation methods if a power loss occurs.

feed.title: EOG Resources, Inc.Appoints John D. Chandler to Its Board of Directors and Committee of the Board, Effective December 10, 2025
feed.summary: EOG Resources, Inc. (EOG) has appointed John D. Chandler to its Board of Directors and the Audit Committee, effective December 10, 2025. Mr. Chandler brings over 30 years of energy industry experience, including financial leadership roles at The Williams Companies, Inc. and Magellan Midstream Partners. He also serves as Chairman of the Board for Matrix Services Company and Chairman of the Audit Committee for LSB Industries, Inc.

feed.title: Altria Group, Inc. (NYSE:MO) to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $1.06
feed.summary: Altria Group, Inc. (NYSE:MO) announced a quarterly dividend of $1.06 per share, payable on January 9th to shareholders of record on December 26th. This annualizes to $4.24, representing a 7.2% yield, and marks the company's 56th consecutive year of dividend increases. The dividend is currently covered by earnings with a payout ratio of 76.5%, though future coverage could be impacted by declining profits.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb Company (NYSE:BMY) Plans Dividend Increase - $0.63 Per Share
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (NYSE: BMY) announced a quarterly dividend increase to $0.63 per share, a 1.6% rise from its previous dividend, with an ex-dividend date of January 2nd and payment on February 2nd. This dividend represents an annualized yield of 4.9% and is supported by a payout ratio of 40.9%, well covered by expected earnings per share. Shares of BMY were trading at $51.21, with analysts maintaining a "Hold" rating and an average target price of $53.83.

feed.title: Ventas, Inc. (NYSE:VTR) Declares $0.48 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Ventas, Inc. (NYSE:VTR) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.48 per share, payable on January 15th to shareholders of record by December 31st, implying an annualized yield of 2.5%. While the current payout ratio of 249.4% is elevated, analysts project future earnings per share of $3.69 next year, which would bring the future payout ratio to about 52%. The stock traded down 1.4% to $76.64, with recent insider selling reported by CEO Peter J. Bulgarelli and CEO Debra A. Cafaro.

feed.title: T. Rowe Price expands active ETF suite with two new equity funds (TROW:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price Group (TROW) has expanded its lineup of active exchange-traded funds by introducing two new equity funds. The new offerings are the T. Rowe Price Active Core U.S. Equity ETF (TACU) and another unspecified fund. This move aims to enhance the asset manager's presence in the active ETF market.

feed.title: Sitime Corporation stock hits all-time high at 386.96 USD
feed.summary: Sitime Corporation (SITM) stock has reached an all-time high of $386.96, representing a 267% increase from its 52-week low and a 75.43% year-to-date return. This surge is supported by robust revenue growth and positive analyst outlooks, despite the company not being profitable over the last twelve months. Analysts from Raymond James, Loop Capital, and Stifel have reiterated favorable ratings, highlighting the company's strong market position and growth trajectory.

feed.title: Altria CEO Gifford to Retire in 2026; Mancuso Named Successor
feed.summary: Altria Group announced that CEO Billy Gifford will retire following the company’s 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on May 14, after more than 30 years with the company. Salvatore “Sal” Mancuso, currently Altria’s executive vice president and CFO, will succeed Gifford as CEO. Heather Newman, Altria’s chief strategy and growth officer, has been named the next CFO, both effective at the 2026 Annual Meeting.

feed.title: INVESTOR DEADLINE APPROACHING: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Investigates Claims on Behalf of Investors of CarMax
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating potential claims against CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX) following alleged false or misleading statements to investors regarding the company's growth prospects and a significant decrease in CarMax Auto Finance income due to increased loan loss provisions. Investors who suffered losses between June 20, 2025, and September 24, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm by the January 2, 2026, deadline to seek the role of lead plaintiff in the federal securities class action. The lawsuit claims CarMax stock fell approximately 20% after the financial results were disclosed on September 25, 2025.

feed.title: PetMed Express: Unraveling Recent Market Moves
feed.summary: PetMed Express Inc. (NASDAQ: PETS) stock has recently surged by 67.8%, driven by investor optimism and strategic moves, despite some financial setbacks. The company's introduction of a new Holiday Collection and the extension of its shareholder rights plan are seen as attempts to enhance value and protect against potential takeovers. While recent earnings showed a decrease in revenue and a detrimental profit margin, the steady gross margin and low valuation indicators suggest potential for a rebound.

feed.title: AIG on the Rise, But What’s Next?
feed.summary: American International Group Inc. (AIG) shares have risen by 4.01% due to positive market sentiment driven by promising developments, including Wells Fargo increasing its price target and Chubb's potential acquisition interest. Analyst views vary, with Cantor Fitzgerald questioning the feasibility of a Chubb merger due to operational overlaps. The article details AIG's financial overview, recent stock performance, and strategic maneuvers aimed at enhancing efficiency and long-term growth.

feed.title: Stryker Corporation Declares Quarterly Dividend, Payable on January 30, 2026
feed.summary: Stryker Corporation announced a quarterly dividend of $0.88 per share, payable on January 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 31, 2025. This dividend represents a 4.8% increase compared to the previous year and quarter. The medical equipment company continues its commitment to returning value to shareholders.

feed.title: Barclays cuts Lennox's PT, cites HVAC market weakness
feed.summary: Barclays has reduced its price target for Lennox International (LII) from $700 to $680, citing cyclical weakness in the residential HVAC market. Despite the company's strong pricing power, concerns about potential demand surges in 2026 and the impact of a recent acquisition are weighing on its valuation. The new PT still represents a 34.4% upside, although the stock is down 15.4% year-to-date.

feed.title: Cboe Global Markets Stock: Is CBOE Outperforming the Financial Sector?
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) has demonstrated strong performance, outpacing the broader financial sector and its rival, Intercontinental Exchange (ICE). The company's impressive Q3 earnings, driven by record revenue and adjusted EPS, underscore its dominance in the financial data & stock exchanges industry. Despite CBOE's recent outperformance, analysts maintain a "Hold" rating, suggesting limited upside from current price levels.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics stock hits all-time high at 173.04 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics Inc (STLD) recently reached an all-time high of $173.04, marking a significant milestone after a 35.88% increase over the past year and a 51.84% gain year-to-date. This performance is supported by a $25.11 billion market capitalization, consistent dividend payments for 22 years, and aggressive share buybacks. Despite the stock appearing slightly overvalued by InvestingPro data, analysts have set price targets as high as $200.09, reflecting positive market sentiment and strategic initiatives like acquiring New Process Steel and an $800 million notes offering.

feed.title: 3E and ServiceNow Announce Partnership to Provide Chemical Management Solution
feed.summary: 3E and ServiceNow have partnered to launch ServiceNow’s new Health and Safety Chemical Management Solution, with 3E providing Safety Data Sheets (SDS) and expert chemical data. This integration aims to streamline chemical management, enhance regulatory compliance, and reduce risk for organizations globally. The long-term partnership will expand to deliver advanced regulatory intelligence and compliance capabilities, supporting evolving environmental, health, and safety needs.

feed.title: Nerdy Inc: CEO Cohn buys $253k in shares
feed.summary: Nerdy Inc. CEO Charles K. Cohn recently purchased 176,215 shares of Class A Common Stock for $253,749, despite the stock currently trading below his purchase price. InvestingPro data suggests the company is undervalued, holds more cash than debt, and has liquid assets exceeding short-term obligations, indicating financial health despite stock volatility. This insider buying follows a slight revenue decline in Q3 2025 for Nerdy Inc., although the company improved its adjusted EBITDA loss.

feed.title: Expeditors International stock hits all-time high at 151.7 USD
feed.summary: Expeditors International of Washington Inc. (EXPD) stock reached an all-time high of $151.7 USD, marking significant growth over the past year. This surge reflects strong investor confidence due to robust financial performance, a market capitalization of $20.3 billion, and consistent dividend payments for 33 years. Recent analyst upgrades and strong Q3 earnings further underscore the company's positive outlook.

feed.title: UBS Group Initiates Coverage on KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR)
feed.summary: UBS Group has initiated coverage on KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) with a "buy" rating and a $176.00 price target, suggesting a potential upside of 22.47%. This comes as KKR recently beat earnings estimates, reporting $1.41 EPS versus $1.30 expected, and revenue of $4.36 billion against a $2.14 billion forecast. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $157.71.

feed.title: Lockheed Backed by States, Industry in Pension Transfer Appeal
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin Corp. has gained support from industry groups and state attorneys general for its appeal regarding pension plans that use annuities from a controversial insurer for de-risking. Amicus briefs filed in the US Court of Appeals for the Fourth Circuit praised the safety and long-standing nature of pension risk transfers, which involve companies purchasing annuities from third-party insurers to move workers off their pension plans. The American Council of Life Insurers highlighted that these transactions are an "integral component" of maintaining pension benefits with "extensive and consistent protections."

feed.title: Rocket Lab Secures CSA Funding for Component R&D; Sivers Partners with Doosan on Ka-Band Arrays
feed.summary: Rocket Lab USA, Inc. has received approximately $1 million CAD from the Canadian Space Agency to develop a new medium-class reaction wheel for the 500-1000 kg satellite market. Concurrently, Sivers Semiconductors AB is partnering with Doosan Corporation in a $1.5 million deal to create Electronically Steerable Array panels for Ka-band satellite terminals, aiming to reduce costs and thermal footprints for maritime and aviation users. Both initiatives underscore a strategic industry shift toward specialized component development to meet the evolving demands of commercial space and LEO broadband constellations.

feed.title: BNY (NYSE: BK) elects Prudential executive Charles F. Lowrey to its board, boosting independent directors to 11 of 12
feed.summary: BNY (NYSE: BK) announced the election of Charles F. Lowrey to its Board of Directors, effective February 15, 2026. This addition will increase the board to 12 directors, with 11 being independent. Mr. Lowrey brings extensive experience from Prudential Financial, where he served as Executive Chairman and formerly as CEO.

feed.title: Rezolute Inc. (RZLT) Stock Price | Live Quotes & Charts | NASDAQ
feed.summary: Rezolute Inc.'s (RZLT) stock price is currently $1.13, experiencing a significant drop of 89.63% or $9.80. There are no recent analyst ratings or earnings information available for the company. The article also encourages users to sign up for free daily trade alerts from an algorithm.

feed.title: Kellanova stock hits 52-week high at 83.42 USD
feed.summary: Kellanova stock has reached a 52-week high of $83.42 USD, reflecting a 5.77% one-year total return and investor confidence despite being considered overvalued by InvestingPro analysis. The company maintains financial stability with 55 consecutive years of dividend payments and recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.58 per share. This positive trend highlights Kellanova's effective navigation of market challenges and capitalization on opportunities within its sector.

feed.title: INVESTOR DEADLINE APPROACHING: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Investigates Claims on Behalf of Investors of Freeport-McMoran
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating potential claims against Freeport-McMoran Inc. (NYSE: FCX) following alleged federal securities law violations. The lawsuit stems from statements made between February 15, 2022, and September 24, 2025, concerning safety at the Grasberg Block Cave mine in Indonesia, which reportedly led to worker fatalities and significant stock price drops. Investors who suffered losses and wish to lead the class action must do so by January 12, 2026.

feed.title: Should You Buy, Sell or Hold FedEx Stock Before Q2 Earnings?
feed.summary: FedEx Corporation (FDX) is poised to release its fiscal Q2 2026 earnings, with analysts anticipating increased earnings per share and revenues fueled by strong holiday shipping demand and cost-reduction initiatives under the DRIVE program. The company has a Zacks Rank #2 and a positive Earnings ESP of +1.38%, suggesting a high probability of beating estimates. FDX stock has outperformed both its industry and rival UPS in the fiscal second quarter and appears undervalued based on its forward 12-month Price/Sales.

feed.title: Pure Storage (NYSE: PSTG) approves $400 million share buyback expansion
feed.summary: Pure Storage (NYSE: PSTG) announced an additional $400 million share repurchase authorization, building on the existing program which had $20 million remaining. This new authorization, approved by the board on December 10, 2025, reflects the company's strong financial position and commitment to shareholder value, with repurchases to be funded from available cash and executed opportunistically. The program has no expiration date but may be suspended or discontinued at any time.

feed.title: Nordson Corporation stock hits 52-week high at 250.04 USD
feed.summary: Nordson Corporation (NDSN) stock reached a new 52-week high of $250.04, reflecting strong investor confidence and a 3.15% increase over the past year. This milestone follows the company's Q4 financial results, where it surpassed analyst EPS estimates with $3.03, despite revenue of $752 million falling slightly below expectations. Nordson also provided a robust outlook for fiscal 2026, indicating continued operational strength.

feed.title: Murphy USA appoints KBP Brands CEO Michael Kulp to board of directors
feed.summary: Murphy USA Inc. announced the appointment of Michael G. Kulp, founder and CEO of KBP Brands, to its board as an independent director. Kulp's extensive background in retail food service and scaling multi-unit businesses is expected to bring valuable insights to Murphy USA, a company operating over 1,750 retail gasoline and convenience stores. This appointment follows Murphy USA's strong third-quarter 2025 earnings, which surpassed analyst expectations.

feed.title: Murphy USA Welcomes Michael G. Kulp to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Murphy USA Inc. (NYSE: MUSA) has appointed Michael G. Kulp, founder and CEO of KBP Brands, to its Board of Directors as an independent director. Kulp's extensive experience in retail food service and scaling multi-unit businesses is expected to provide valuable insights for Murphy USA's continued operational excellence and shareholder value. KBP Brands operates over 1,200 quick-service restaurants across 32 states.
